      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof analyze subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.config import load_config\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.pcap_reader import read_pcap, discover_capture_files\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.flow_tracker import FlowTracker\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.tcp_reassembly import TCPReassembler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import HTTP2Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.grpc import GrpcHandler\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\nfrom netprof.report.profile_md import build_profile_md\r\nfrom netprof.report.errors import ErrorLogger\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _capture_file_id(path: Path, index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Stable id for correlation (basename or index).\"\"\"\r\n    return path.name or str(index)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_protocols(\r\n    c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n    s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n    flow_id: str,\r\n    c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    errors: ErrorLogger,\r\n) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n    \"\"\"Run protocol handlers in order: HTTP/2 (+ gRPC) or HTTP/1.1. Return merged transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    http2_handler = HTTP2Handler()\r\n    grpc_handler = GrpcHandler()\r\n    http1_handler = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    if http2_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        http2_txns = http2_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_txns = grpc_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_streams = {(t.flow_id, t.stream_id) for t in grpc_txns if t.stream_id is not None}\r\n        out = []\r\n        for t in http2_txns:\r\n            if (t.flow_id, t.stream_id) in grpc_streams:\r\n                continue\r\n            out.append(t)\r\n        out.extend(grpc_txns)\r\n        return out\r\n    if http1_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        return http1_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n    return []\r\n\r\n\r\ndef analyze_cmd(\r\n    pcap_path: Path = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Path to PCAP/PCAPNG file or directory\"),\r\n    out: Path = typer.Option(..., \"--out\", help=\"Output directory\"),\r\n    config: Path | None = typer.Option(None, \"--config\", help=\"Optional YAML config path\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Analyze PCAP/PCAPNG and write summary, flows, transactions, profile.md, errors.log.\"\"\"\r\n    settings = load_config(config)\r\n    out_path = Path(out)\r\n    out_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\r\n    errors = ErrorLogger(out_path)\r\n    try:\r\n        files = discover_capture_files(Path(pcap_path))\r\n        if not files:\r\n            typer.echo(f\"No capture files found at {pcap_path}\", err=True)\r\n            raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n        reassembler = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=settings.reassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes)\r\n        all_flows: list[Flow] = []\r\n        all_transactions: list[Transaction] = []\r\n        for file_index, path in enumerate(files):\r\n            capture_file_id = _capture_file_id(path, file_index)\r\n            tracker = FlowTracker(\r\n                capture_file_id=capture_file_id,\r\n                flow_idle_timeout_sec=settings.flow_idle_timeout_sec,\r\n                concurrency_bucket_seconds=settings.concurrency_bucket_seconds,\r\n            )\r\n            try:\r\n                for ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags in read_pcap(\r\n                    path\r\n                ):\r\n                    for flow, segments in tracker.ingest(\r\n                        ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags\r\n                    ):\r\n                        c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                        if truncated:\r\n                            errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                        all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                        txns = _run_protocols(\r\n                            c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors\r\n                        )\r\n                        all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n            except Exception as e:\r\n                errors.log(f\"Error processing {path}: {e}\")\r\n            for flow, segments in tracker.flush_idle():\r\n                c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                if truncated:\r\n                    errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                txns = _run_protocols(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors)\r\n                all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n        # Write flows.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"flows.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for flow in all_flows:\r\n                f.write(flow.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Write transactions.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"transactions.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for t in all_transactions:\r\n                f.write(t.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Summary and profile\r\n        summary = build_summary(\r\n            all_flows,\r\n            all_transactions,\r\n            top_talkers_n=settings.top_talkers_n,\r\n            top_destinations_n=settings.top_destinations_n,\r\n            top_ports_n=settings.top_ports_n,\r\n        )\r\n        with open(out_path / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n        profile_md = build_profile_md(summary, all_transactions)\r\n        with open(out_path / \"profile.md\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(profile_md)\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Wrote {out_path}: {len(all_flows)} flows, {len(all_transactions)} transactions.\")\r\n    finally:\r\n        errors.close()\r\n"
        },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof fixtures generate subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfixtures_app = typer.Typer()\r\n\r\n\r\n@fixtures_app.command(\"generate\")\r\ndef generate_fixtures(\r\n    output_dir: Path = typer.Option(\r\n        Path(\"fixtures\"),\r\n        \"--output\",\r\n        \"-o\",\r\n        help=\"Directory to write fixture PCAPs\",\r\n    ),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Generate deterministic synthetic PCAP fixtures for tests.\"\"\"\r\n    from netprof.cli.fixture_gen import generate_http1_pcap, generate_http2_pcap\r\n\r\n    out = Path(output_dir)\r\n    out.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\r\n    generate_http1_pcap(out / \"http1_keepalive.pcap\")\r\n    generate_http2_pcap(out / \"http2_minimal.pcap\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Generated fixtures in {out}\")\r\n\r\n\r\n__all__ = [\"fixtures_app\"]\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "0057fbf12daa77462fffd1f7ce34c6e871b5f374df0efe5c8a8428a906b7baca",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Generate deterministic synthetic PCAP fixtures using scapy and h2.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\n# Deterministic IPs/ports for fixtures\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_IP = \"192.168.1.100\"\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_IP = \"192.168.1.1\"\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT = 45000\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_PORT = 80\r\nINITIAL_CLIENT_ISN = 1000\r\nINITIAL_SERVER_ISN = 2000\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _get_scapy():\r\n    try:\r\n        from scapy.all import Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n        return Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        raise ImportError(\"scapy is required for fixture generation (pip install scapy)\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http1_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http1_keepalive.pcap: one TCP flow with 2 HTTP/1.1 requests (keep-alive).\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"A\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # Request 1\r\n    req1 = (\r\n        b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Host: example.com\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(req1)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 1\r\n    resp1 = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Content-Length: 5\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"hello\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(resp1)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Request 2\r\n    req2 = (\r\n        b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Host: example.com\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(req2)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req2)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 2\r\n    resp2 = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Content-Length: 5\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"world\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(resp2)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp2)\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http2_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http2_minimal.pcap: one TCP flow with HTTP/2 client preface and minimal SETTINGS + HEADERS + DATA.\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    # Build HTTP/2 bytes: preface + SETTINGS (empty) + HEADERS (minimal request) + DATA\r\n    preface = b\"PRI * HTTP/2.0\\r\\n\\r\\nSM\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=True)\r\n        conn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        conn.initiate_connection()\r\n        data_to_send = conn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Request: GET / HTTP/2\r\n        stream_id = conn.get_next_available_stream_id()\r\n        conn.send_headers(stream_id, [(\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")], end_stream=True)\r\n        data_to_send += conn.data_to_send()\r\n        client_bytes = preface + data_to_send\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        # Fallback: minimal manual framing (SETTINGS frame type=4, length=0, stream_id=0)\r\n        # 9-byte header: 3 bytes length (0), 1 type (4), 1 flags (0), 4 stream_id (0)\r\n        settings_frame = bytes([0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0])\r\n        # HEADERS frame for stream 1: type=1, need to HPACK-encode :method GET, :path /\r\n        import hpack\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")])\r\n        # Frame: length=len(encoded), type=1, flags=5 (END_HEADERS|END_STREAM), stream_id=1\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 5, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + encoded\r\n        client_bytes = preface + settings_frame + headers_frame\r\n    # Server: SETTINGS ack, HEADERS response :status 200, DATA \"ok\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=False)\r\n        sconn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        sconn.initiate_connection()\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Receive client data (preface + frames) to update state\r\n        sconn.receive_data(client_bytes[len(preface):])\r\n        # Send response\r\n        sconn.send_headers(1, [(\":status\", \"200\")], end_headers=True)\r\n        sconn.send_data(1, b\"ok\", end_stream=True)\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        import hpack\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":status\", \"200\")])\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 4, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + encoded\r\n        data_frame = bytes([0, 0, 2, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + b\"ok\"  # length=2, type=0, flags=1 (END_STREAM)\r\n        server_bytes = headers_frame + data_frame\r\n    # Build TCP session with scapy\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK + client bytes (preface + frames)\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(client_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(client_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # ACK from server (optional) + server bytes\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(server_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n"
        },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Netprof CLI entrypoint.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.cli.analyze import analyze_cmd\r\nfrom netprof.cli.fixtures_cmd import fixtures_app\r\nfrom netprof.cli.summarize import summarize_cmd\r\n\r\napp = typer.Typer(name=\"netprof\", help=\"Offline network traffic collector and behavior profiler\")\r\napp.command(\"analyze\")(analyze_cmd)\r\napp.command(\"summarize\")(summarize_cmd)\r\napp.add_typer(fixtures_app, name=\"fixtures\")\r\n\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n    app()\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "7e65bf82876542fea75484ee613d5499982406cc9ca6fa32bcdc4d76ff69ea07",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof summarize subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\n\r\n\r\ndef summarize_cmd(\r\n    output_dir: Path = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Output directory containing flows.jsonl and transactions.jsonl\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Recompute and print key metrics from flows.jsonl and transactions.jsonl.\"\"\"\r\n    out = Path(output_dir)\r\n    flows_path = out / \"flows.jsonl\"\r\n    txns_path = out / \"transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    if not flows_path.exists():\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Not found: {flows_path}\", err=True)\r\n        raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n    flows = []\r\n    with open(flows_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n        for line in f:\r\n            line = line.strip()\r\n            if not line:\r\n                continue\r\n            flows.append(Flow.model_validate(json.loads(line)))\r\n    transactions = []\r\n    if txns_path.exists():\r\n        with open(txns_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for line in f:\r\n                line = line.strip()\r\n                if not line:\r\n                    continue\r\n                transactions.append(Transaction.model_validate(json.loads(line)))\r\n    summary = build_summary(flows, transactions)\r\n    # Overwrite summary.json\r\n    with open(out / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n        f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n    # Print key metrics\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total flows: {summary.total_flows}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total bytes: {summary.total_bytes}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total transactions: {summary.total_transactions}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Active flow peaks: {summary.active_flow_peaks}\")\r\n    lp = summary.latency_percentiles\r\n    if lp.p50_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p50: {lp.p50_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n    if lp.p90_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p90: {lp.p90_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n    if lp.p99_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p99: {lp.p99_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n"
        },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for TCP reassembly (out-of-order, retrans).\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.tcp_reassembly import TCPReassembler\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_reassembly_in_order():\r\n    \"\"\"In-order segments produce correct stream.\"\"\"\r\n    r = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=1 << 20)\r\n    segments = [\r\n        (1000.0, b\"Hello\", \"c2s\", 1000),\r\n        (1000.01, b\" \", \"c2s\", 1005),\r\n        (1000.02, b\"World\", \"c2s\", 1006),\r\n        (1000.03, b\"OK\", \"s2c\", 2000),\r\n    ]\r\n    c2s, s2c, _, _, truncated = r.reassemble(segments)\r\n    assert c2s == b\"Hello World\"\r\n    assert s2c == b\"OK\"\r\n    assert not truncated\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_reassembly_out_of_order():\r\n    \"\"\"Out-of-order segments are reordered.\"\"\"\r\n    r = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=1 << 20)\r\n    segments = [\r\n        (1000.0, b\"BBB\", \"c2s\", 1003),\r\n        (1000.01, b\"AAA\", \"c2s\", 1000),\r\n        (1000.02, b\"CCC\", \"c2s\", 1006),\r\n    ]\r\n    c2s, s2c, _, _, _ = r.reassemble(segments)\r\n    assert c2s == b\"AAABBBCCC\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_reassembly_retrans_duplicate():\r\n    \"\"\"Duplicate (retrans) segment does not duplicate data.\"\"\"\r\n    r = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=1 << 20)\r\n    segments = [\r\n        (1000.0, b\"AAA\", \"c2s\", 1000),\r\n        (1000.01, b\"AAA\", \"c2s\", 1000),  # retrans\r\n        (1000.02, b\"BBB\", \"c2s\", 1003),\r\n    ]\r\n    c2s, _, _, _, _ = r.reassemble(segments)\r\n    assert c2s == b\"AAABBB\"\r\n"
        },

        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for gRPC detection and :path extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.grpc import GrpcHandler, _parse_grpc_path, _parse_grpc_message_sizes, GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_grpc_path_parse():\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_path(\"/package.Service/Method\") == (\"package.Service\", \"Method\")\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_path(\"/grpc.health.v1.Health/Check\") == (\"grpc.health.v1.Health\", \"Check\")\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_path(\"/\") == (None, None)\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_path(\"\") == (None, None)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_grpc_message_sizes():\r\n    \"\"\"gRPC framing: 1 byte compressed + 4 byte length (big-endian) + payload.\"\"\"\r\n    import struct\r\n    # One message length 3\r\n    data = bytes([0]) + struct.pack(\">I\", 3) + b\"abc\"\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data) == [3]\r\n    # Two messages\r\n    data += bytes([0]) + struct.pack(\">I\", 2) + b\"xy\"\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data) == [3, 2]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_grpc_detect_requires_http2():\r\n    h = GrpcHandler()\r\n    # Plain HTTP/1.1 is not gRPC\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\", b\"\") is False\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "5e40677d4b6514785a239d13cf89ecf6e2fec01b002baa1a3b0dff7f3b0f0936",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for HTTP/1.1 transaction extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http1\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_detect():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: x\\r\\n\\r\\n\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\\r\\n\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"\\x00\\x01\\x02\", b\"\") is False\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_parse_single():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    c2s = b\"GET /foo HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    s2c = b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n    txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n    assert len(txns) == 1\r\n    assert txns[0].method == \"GET\"\r\n    assert txns[0].path == \"/foo\"\r\n    assert txns[0].authority == \"example.com\"\r\n    assert txns[0].status_code == 200\r\n    assert txns[0].flow_id == \"flow1\"\r\n    assert txns[0].txn_id == compute_txn_id_http1(\"flow1\", 0)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_parse_keepalive_two():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    c2s = (\r\n        b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    s2c = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nworld\"\r\n    )\r\n    txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n    assert len(txns) == 2\r\n    assert txns[0].path == \"/first\"\r\n    assert txns[1].path == \"/second\"\r\n"
        },

http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": {"1:I64": 4845634861506629183}, "2:LEN": "REDACTED", "6:VARINT": 4, "7:LEN": [{"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof analyze subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.config import load_config\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.pcap_reader import read_pcap, discover_capture_files\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.flow_tracker import FlowTracker\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.tcp_reassembly import TCPReassembler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import HTTP2Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.grpc import GrpcHandler\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\nfrom netprof.report.profile_md import build_profile_md\r\nfrom netprof.report.errors import ErrorLogger\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _capture_file_id(path: Path, index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Stable id for correlation (basename or index).\"\"\"\r\n    return path.name or str(index)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_protocols(\r\n    c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n    s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n    flow_id: str,\r\n    c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    errors: ErrorLogger,\r\n) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n    \"\"\"Run protocol handlers in order: HTTP/2 (+ gRPC) or HTTP/1.1. Return merged transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    http2_handler = HTTP2Handler()\r\n    grpc_handler = GrpcHandler()\r\n    http1_handler = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    if http2_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        http2_txns = http2_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_txns = grpc_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_streams = {(t.flow_id, t.stream_id) for t in grpc_txns if t.stream_id is not None}\r\n        out = []\r\n        for t in http2_txns:\r\n            if (t.flow_id, t.stream_id) in grpc_streams:\r\n                continue\r\n            out.append(t)\r\n        out.extend(grpc_txns)\r\n        return out\r\n    if http1_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        return http1_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n    return []\r\n\r\n\r\ndef analyze_cmd(\r\n    pcap_path: Path = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Path to PCAP/PCAPNG file or directory\"),\r\n    out: Path = typer.Option(..., \"--out\", help=\"Output directory\"),\r\n    config: Path | None = typer.Option(None, \"--config\", help=\"Optional YAML config path\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Analyze PCAP/PCAPNG and write summary, flows, transactions, profile.md, errors.log.\"\"\"\r\n    settings = load_config(config)\r\n    out_path = Path(out)\r\n    out_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\r\n    errors = ErrorLogger(out_path)\r\n    try:\r\n        files = discover_capture_files(Path(pcap_path))\r\n        if not files:\r\n            typer.echo(f\"No capture files found at {pcap_path}\", err=True)\r\n            raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n        reassembler = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=settings.reassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes)\r\n        all_flows: list[Flow] = []\r\n        all_transactions: list[Transaction] = []\r\n        for file_index, path in enumerate(files):\r\n            capture_file_id = _capture_file_id(path, file_index)\r\n            tracker = FlowTracker(\r\n                capture_file_id=capture_file_id,\r\n                flow_idle_timeout_sec=settings.flow_idle_timeout_sec,\r\n                concurrency_bucket_seconds=settings.concurrency_bucket_seconds,\r\n            )\r\n            try:\r\n                for ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags in read_pcap(\r\n                    path\r\n                ):\r\n                    for flow, segments in tracker.ingest(\r\n                        ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags\r\n                    ):\r\n                        c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                        if truncated:\r\n                            errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                        all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                        txns = _run_protocols(\r\n                            c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors\r\n                        )\r\n                        all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n            except Exception as e:\r\n                errors.log(f\"Error processing {path}: {e}\")\r\n            for flow, segments in tracker.flush_idle():\r\n                c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                if truncated:\r\n                    errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                txns = _run_protocols(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors)\r\n                all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n        # Write flows.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"flows.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for flow in all_flows:\r\n                f.write(flow.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Write transactions.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"transactions.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for t in all_transactions:\r\n                f.write(t.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Summary and profile\r\n        summary = build_summary(\r\n            all_flows,\r\n            all_transactions,\r\n            top_talkers_n=settings.top_talkers_n,\r\n            top_destinations_n=settings.top_destinations_n,\r\n            top_ports_n=settings.top_ports_n,\r\n        )\r\n        with open(out_path / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n        profile_md = build_profile_md(summary, all_transactions)\r\n        with open(out_path / \"profile.md\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(profile_md)\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Wrote {out_path}: {len(all_flows)} flows, {len(all_transactions)} transactions.\")\r\n    finally:\r\n        errors.close()\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "206f03efd724773aaa033dd181440c05c0bef6fc5eabbaaa882c33c7489ddbae", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof fixtures generate subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfixtures_app = typer.Typer()\r\n\r\n\r\n@fixtures_app.command(\"generate\")\r\ndef generate_fixtures(\r\n    output_dir: Path = typer.Option(\r\n        Path(\"fixtures\"),\r\n        \"--output\",\r\n        \"-o\",\r\n        help=\"Directory to write fixture PCAPs\",\r\n    ),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Generate deterministic synthetic PCAP fixtures for tests.\"\"\"\r\n    from netprof.cli.fixture_gen import generate_http1_pcap, generate_http2_pcap\r\n\r\n    out = Path(output_dir)\r\n    out.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\r\n    generate_http1_pcap(out / \"http1_keepalive.pcap\")\r\n    generate_http2_pcap(out / \"http2_minimal.pcap\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Generated fixtures in {out}\")\r\n\r\n\r\n__all__ = [\"fixtures_app\"]\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "0057fbf12daa77462fffd1f7ce34c6e871b5f374df0efe5c8a8428a906b7baca", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Generate deterministic synthetic PCAP fixtures using scapy and h2.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\n# Deterministic IPs/ports for fixtures\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_IP = \"192.168.1.100\"\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_IP = \"192.168.1.1\"\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT = 45000\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_PORT = 80\r\nINITIAL_CLIENT_ISN = 1000\r\nINITIAL_SERVER_ISN = 2000\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _get_scapy():\r\n    try:\r\n        from scapy.all import Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n        return Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        raise ImportError(\"scapy is required for fixture generation (pip install scapy)\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http1_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http1_keepalive.pcap: one TCP flow with 2 HTTP/1.1 requests (keep-alive).\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"A\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # Request 1\r\n    req1 = (\r\n        b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Host: example.com\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(req1)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 1\r\n    resp1 = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Content-Length: 5\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"hello\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(resp1)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Request 2\r\n    req2 = (\r\n        b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Host: example.com\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(req2)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req2)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 2\r\n    resp2 = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Content-Length: 5\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"world\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(resp2)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp2)\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http2_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http2_minimal.pcap: one TCP flow with HTTP/2 client preface and minimal SETTINGS + HEADERS + DATA.\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    # Build HTTP/2 bytes: preface + SETTINGS (empty) + HEADERS (minimal request) + DATA\r\n    preface = b\"PRI * HTTP/2.0\\r\\n\\r\\nSM\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=True)\r\n        conn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        conn.initiate_connection()\r\n        data_to_send = conn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Request: GET / HTTP/2\r\n        stream_id = conn.get_next_available_stream_id()\r\n        conn.send_headers(stream_id, [(\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")], end_stream=True)\r\n        data_to_send += conn.data_to_send()\r\n        client_bytes = preface + data_to_send\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        # Fallback: minimal manual framing (SETTINGS frame type=4, length=0, stream_id=0)\r\n        # 9-byte header: 3 bytes length (0), 1 type (4), 1 flags (0), 4 stream_id (0)\r\n        settings_frame = bytes([0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0])\r\n        # HEADERS frame for stream 1: type=1, need to HPACK-encode :method GET, :path /\r\n        import hpack\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")])\r\n        # Frame: length=len(encoded), type=1, flags=5 (END_HEADERS|END_STREAM), stream_id=1\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 5, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + encoded\r\n        client_bytes = preface + settings_frame + headers_frame\r\n    # Server: SETTINGS ack, HEADERS response :status 200, DATA \"ok\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=False)\r\n        sconn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        sconn.initiate_connection()\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Receive client data (preface + frames) to update state\r\n        sconn.receive_data(client_bytes[len(preface):])\r\n        # Send response\r\n        sconn.send_headers(1, [(\":status\", \"200\")], end_headers=True)\r\n        sconn.send_data(1, b\"ok\", end_stream=True)\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        import hpack\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":status\", \"200\")])\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 4, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + encoded\r\n        data_frame = bytes([0, 0, 2, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + b\"ok\"  # length=2, type=0, flags=1 (END_STREAM)\r\n        server_bytes = headers_frame + data_frame\r\n    # Build TCP session with scapy\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK + client bytes (preface + frames)\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(client_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(client_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # ACK from server (optional) + server bytes\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(server_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "874ce098c1c2200cc2664d80ec32b8cf8406a81527f7d97ccacd10595e44857f", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Netprof CLI entrypoint.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.cli.analyze import analyze_cmd\r\nfrom netprof.cli.fixtures_cmd import fixtures_app\r\nfrom netprof.cli.summarize import summarize_cmd\r\n\r\napp = typer.Typer(name=\"netprof\", help=\"Offline network traffic collector and behavior profiler\")\r\napp.command(\"analyze\")(analyze_cmd)\r\napp.command(\"summarize\")(summarize_cmd)\r\napp.add_typer(fixtures_app, name=\"fixtures\")\r\n\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n    app()\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "7e65bf82876542fea75484ee613d5499982406cc9ca6fa32bcdc4d76ff69ea07", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof summarize subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\n\r\n\r\ndef summarize_cmd(\r\n    output_dir: Path = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Output directory containing flows.jsonl and transactions.jsonl\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Recompute and print key metrics from flows.jsonl and transactions.jsonl.\"\"\"\r\n    out = Path(output_dir)\r\n    flows_path = out / \"flows.jsonl\"\r\n    txns_path = out / \"transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    if not flows_path.exists():\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Not found: {flows_path}\", err=True)\r\n        raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n    flows = []\r\n    with open(flows_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n        for line in f:\r\n            line = line.strip()\r\n            if not line:\r\n                continue\r\n            flows.append(Flow.model_validate(json.loads(line)))\r\n    transactions = []\r\n    if txns_path.exists():\r\n        with open(txns_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for line in f:\r\n                line = line.strip()\r\n                if not line:\r\n                    continue\r\n                transactions.append(Transaction.model_validate(json.loads(line)))\r\n    summary = build_summary(flows, transactions)\r\n    # Overwrite summary.json\r\n    with open(out / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n        f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n    # Print key metrics\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total flows: {summary.total_flows}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total bytes: {summary.total_bytes}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total transactions: {summary.total_transactions}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Active flow peaks: {summary.active_flow_peaks}\")\r\n    lp = summary.latency_percentiles\r\n    if lp.p50_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p50: {lp.p50_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n    if lp.p90_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p90: {lp.p90_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n    if lp.p99_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p99: {lp.p99_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "13e0122a5c827c1c4edd4108a07c5a2bc8be5455c480f57a8b189fea985aa8c1", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for TCP reassembly (out-of-order, retrans).\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.tcp_reassembly import TCPReassembler\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_reassembly_in_order():\r\n    \"\"\"In-order segments produce correct stream.\"\"\"\r\n    r = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=1 << 20)\r\n    segments = [\r\n        (1000.0, b\"Hello\", \"c2s\", 1000),\r\n        (1000.01, b\" \", \"c2s\", 1005),\r\n        (1000.02, b\"World\", \"c2s\", 1006),\r\n        (1000.03, b\"OK\", \"s2c\", 2000),\r\n    ]\r\n    c2s, s2c, _, _, truncated = r.reassemble(segments)\r\n    assert c2s == b\"Hello World\"\r\n    assert s2c == b\"OK\"\r\n    assert not truncated\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_reassembly_out_of_order():\r\n    \"\"\"Out-of-order segments are reordered.\"\"\"\r\n    r = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=1 << 20)\r\n    segments = [\r\n        (1000.0, b\"BBB\", \"c2s\", 1003),\r\n        (1000.01, b\"AAA\", \"c2s\", 1000),\r\n        (1000.02, b\"CCC\", \"c2s\", 1006),\r\n    ]\r\n    c2s, s2c, _, _, _ = r.reassemble(segments)\r\n    assert c2s == b\"AAABBBCCC\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_reassembly_retrans_duplicate():\r\n    \"\"\"Duplicate (retrans) segment does not duplicate data.\"\"\"\r\n    r = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=1 << 20)\r\n    segments = [\r\n        (1000.0, b\"AAA\", \"c2s\", 1000),\r\n        (1000.01, b\"AAA\", \"c2s\", 1000),  # retrans\r\n        (1000.02, b\"BBB\", \"c2s\", 1003),\r\n    ]\r\n    c2s, _, _, _, _ = r.reassemble(segments)\r\n    assert c2s == b\"AAABBB\"\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "14aa50112472494458553dac821fd156016c4cff6a69c7e241ab787e2694fa77", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for gRPC detection and :path extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.grpc import GrpcHandler, _parse_grpc_path, _parse_grpc_message_sizes, GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_grpc_path_parse():\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_path(\"/package.Service/Method\") == (\"package.Service\", \"Method\")\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_path(\"/grpc.health.v1.Health/Check\") == (\"grpc.health.v1.Health\", \"Check\")\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_path(\"/\") == (None, None)\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_path(\"\") == (None, None)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_grpc_message_sizes():\r\n    \"\"\"gRPC framing: 1 byte compressed + 4 byte length (big-endian) + payload.\"\"\"\r\n    import struct\r\n    # One message length 3\r\n    data = bytes([0]) + struct.pack(\">I\", 3) + b\"abc\"\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data) == [3]\r\n    # Two messages\r\n    data += bytes([0]) + struct.pack(\">I\", 2) + b\"xy\"\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data) == [3, 2]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_grpc_detect_requires_http2():\r\n    h = GrpcHandler()\r\n    # Plain HTTP/1.1 is not gRPC\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\", b\"\") is False\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "5e40677d4b6514785a239d13cf89ecf6e2fec01b002baa1a3b0dff7f3b0f0936", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for HTTP/1.1 transaction extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http1\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_detect():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: x\\r\\n\\r\\n\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\\r\\n\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"\\x00\\x01\\x02\", b\"\") is False\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_parse_single():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    c2s = b\"GET /foo HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    s2c = b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n    txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n    assert len(txns) == 1\r\n    assert txns[0].method == \"GET\"\r\n    assert txns[0].path == \"/foo\"\r\n    assert txns[0].authority == \"example.com\"\r\n    assert txns[0].status_code == 200\r\n    assert txns[0].flow_id == \"flow1\"\r\n    assert txns[0].txn_id == compute_txn_id_http1(\"flow1\", 0)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_parse_keepalive_two():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    c2s = (\r\n        b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    s2c = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nworld\"\r\n    )\r\n    txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n    assert len(txns) == 2\r\n    assert txns[0].path == \"/first\"\r\n    assert txns[1].path == \"/second\"\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "c8b83e16f99c8112bb95acab0d142509b0a11487ee38577483ab302d3c6b3b93", "3:LEN":
